titleStmt.title: Copy of a manuscript document ōlai grating several rights to three temple women tēvaraṭiyār, including signing the tiruvempāvai during the Tiruvātirai festival in Mārkaḻi.

summary.p: The record is dated to the 14th century (most probably on paleaographical grounds).

div.p:
caṇḍeśvaraṉ Ōlai sāgarañcūḻ vaiyyakattuk kaṇṭiśvaraṉ karumamārāyka paṇṭeyaṟa ṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉ pātan tiṟampāmaṟ ceṉṉimel vaittu Aruḷāl Āticaṇḍeśvaraṉ Ādeśam nam
Uṭaiyār tirumurukaṉpūṇṭi y-āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyiṟ tēvaraṭiyāril Āṭkoṇṭanācci maka māḷāṉa cavuṇṭaya naṅkaikkum Ivaḷ taṅkai makkaḷ toḻiyāṉa tiruvuṇāḻiyar naṅkaikkum Ivaḷ
taṅkai kāṅkaya-nācci-y-āṉa Ālālacuntara-naṅkaikkum nam Ōlai kuṭutta paṭiyāvatu Īśvara samvat til Ivarkaḷukku nām tiruvanti-k-kāppu-k kuṭukkaiyil Ivarkaḷ tiruvanti-k-kāppum Eṭuttu paṇiyumuṟai
yuñ ceytu Uṭaiyārkku paṇimāṟuṅ kālantōṟum tirunīṟṟu-k-kāpput tirukkaṇṇāṭi tiruveṉ Aṭukkoliyil taṭṭu-k kāḷāñci Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyum Eṭuppārkaḷākavum tirunāḷukku naṭe
śvara nāyaṉār Eḻuntaruḷum poḻutu muṉṉaraṅku Eṟak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivar tirumuṉpu piccaveṣam kaḷākavum Inta mahotsavattukku Eṟiyaruḷum tirutter tirunaṭappuṅkoyil tirunaṭaikkā
vaṇamuḷḷiṭṭa Āsanaṅkaḷeṟak kaṭavarkaḷākavum tirumārkaḻit tiruvātiraikku muṉṟā lāyuḷḷa tiruvempāvaikku kaināṭṭi muṉṟām Aṟai mutalāyuḷḷa Aṟaiyuṅ kaṭṭakkaṭava
rkaḷākavum meṟcāttum parivaṭṭamum peṟakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Intat tiruvantikkāppāl van sarvvaprāptikaḷāṉa varicaikaḷum peṟakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ makkaḷ makkaḷ cantirā
tityavarai Aṉupavittu varuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikkuc cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik koḷvatāka nam Ōlai kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Aruḷic ceyalpaṭikku tevarkaṉmi cikāḻippiḷḷai Eḻuttu pāl vaṇṇattāṇṭ(ā) perumāḷ Eḻuttu Aṇṇāmalaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Aṭikkiḻttaḷattuc cera-sa
ṉ Eḻuttu māṭāpattiyam kāñcipurattu comaṉātatevaṉ Eḻuttu tāṉattāril namaccivāya tevaṉ Eḻuttu kaṇṭiyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Āṉantakkūttaṉ Eḻuttu muttikku nāyakaṉ Eḻuttu tiruvam palapaṭṭi kāṭṭiya kaiyyaṉ Eḻuttu Āṉantakkūttaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Aruḷāl Āticaṇṭeśvara śrī karaṇattāṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
